title: Perfect Better Vanilla
description: A French mod pack that makes your Vanilla experience amazing
body:
I created the most complete multiplayer compatible Vanilla mod pack available in last version, the mod pack will be improved in the future with new features and optimization based on feedback.



![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8748f66490e9433694d3af69d23f0c79bdbffb66.png)



<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/bA1cx41UdYM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>









### Features

**⚡Optimized**

With Sodium, Super Resolution, and other optimization mods, your game remains stable and performs well with excellent graphics.

![Super Resolution](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1c96bfbe35922879ec1fff15849e4c767e33741.png)

![Settings Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4ead017a5d59171e30cde651377ef0b5e7d755e.png)


**☔Particules custom**

Various particles were added and configured specifically for the pack to improve immersion.

![new_particle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c914cc27a4d3aef51684e40446e7e18f9f6ad1f8.png)


**🌄Beautiful graphic**

With the Complementary Reimagined shaders configure with precision.

![voxy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/980b98e0b2720b56eb4c8c0cd4fc2a943e89a5c9.png)

![Colored Light](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d22a110f98546115cc75cacf5f2b47ab4c3c45ac.png)

![Sun](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b7e77cbb7e57301e3b483496d5d74480dc7b71c.png)


**⛓️‍💥Connected texture**

Connected textures for even more immersion.

![Connected texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8fed0f15652ccd339f4a112125a4566aaa1c11d5.png)
